structural_model: risk_it = rho * risk_i,t-1 + beta1 * degradation_index_it + beta2 * sensor_mean_z_it + beta3 * pc2_it + gamma' * operating_conditions_it + unit_effect_i + error_it

dynamic_gmm_role_suggestion.note: N-CMAPSS DS01 has 6 units after unit-cycle aggregation. Use this as a workflow/data-processing smoke artifact. Use controlled benchmarks or classic FD001 for formal dynamic-GMM parity.
